backtest_summary.dedupe_explanation: Repeated 15-minute AWS scans are counted once per target, market, and side, using the first approved (entry) snapshot so approved metrics reflect trades actually taken, not the decayed last scan.

top_rejections.reason: basket guardrail: no tail NO leg passed the norm

learnings: Lower-bound edge split: edge_lcb<0 trades netted $-19.59 (25 trades) vs edge_lcb>=0 at $-15.03 (15 trades).
NO side: 14/37 won, net $-36.57 this window.
YES side: 1/3 won, net $+1.95 this window.
Profile split: live 1/5 won ($-1.76); research 14/35 won ($-32.86). Judge each gate set on its own book; research-profile losses are expected data-collection cost.
Most frequent gate rejections: edge (11886x); source spread (10884x).
Clean next-day forecast error averaged 2.83F across 6 settled day(s) in this window.
recommended_changes: Window ROI is materially negative on a fair sample; audit the largest losers for a shared failure mode before the next change.
Hit rate is below 40%; check whether losses cluster in one bin distance or side.
Mean absolute forecast error is 2.83F; review source weights and recent Google/NWS disagreement before trusting tail bins.
